metadata.description: 28 C-Suite executive personas + 8 business legend advisors for Claude Code. Each built from research on the world's top 25 leaders in that role.

plugins.name: exec
plugins.description: 28 C-Suite executive personas built from research on the world's top 25 leaders per role. Includes CEO, Finance, Technology, Operations, InfoSec, Revenue, Marketing, and 21 more specialized executive roles.

plugins.name: board
plugins.description: 8 business legends as your advisory board: Alex Hormozi, Grant Cardone, Seth Godin, Gary Vee, Jordan Belfort, Russell Brunson, Dan Kennedy, Tony Robbins. Expert advice on offers, sales, positioning, content, funnels, and peak performance.

plugins.name: allhands
plugins.description: Round-table consultation with all 28 executives and 8 board advisors simultaneously. Get multi-perspective strategic analysis on any business decision.
